metadata.description: IRIS For Health Interoperability skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: iris-interop-skills
plugins.description: 18 skills for building IRIS For Health Interoperability productions with Claude — including a post-build conformance review. Start at the iris-interop router. Requires an IRIS MCP server (iris-agentic-dev or iris-interop-dev). Ships 4 PostToolUse hooks + 4 agents (interop-builder, deploy-smoke-test, introspect-dont-guess, conformance-reviewer).
